faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before your visit

items.q: How often should I visit the dentist?
items.a: We recommend a check-up every 6 months for a routine examination and professional cleaning.
Professional whitening is generally painless. Temporary sensitivity may occur but fades quickly.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: We accept cash, credit cards, and offer payment plans for major treatments.

items.q: How long does orthodontic treatment take?
items.a: Duration varies by case, but standard orthodontic treatment takes between 12 and 24 months.
Yes, we reserve emergency slots every day for patients with acute pain.
